examples.title: Class-specific new and delete overloading
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overload new and delete for a specific class
examples.explanation: Shows class-specific overloaded new/delete being called instead of global versions. Tracks allocation count.

examples.title: Placement New Example
examples.description: Shows how to use placement new to construct objects at specific memory locations
examples.explanation: Demonstrates placement new for constructing objects at pre-allocated memory addresses, useful for memory pools.

examples.title: Memory Pool Allocator
examples.description: Simple memory pool implementation for efficient object allocation
examples.explanation: Demonstrates memory pool pattern for efficient frequent allocations - reduces overhead and fragmentation.
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) where n is pool size

examples.title: Smart Pointers for Automatic Memory Management
examples.description: Demonstrates RAII through smart pointers to prevent memory leaks
examples.explanation: Smart pointers implement RAII for automatic memory management, preventing leaks through automatic deallocation.

examples.title: Custom Global new/delete with Debugging
examples.description: Global overload for tracking all allocations in a program
examples.explanation: Global new/delete overload for debugging memory issues - tracks allocation location and total memory.
